name: ThirdPersonCamera
shortDescription: Third-person camera orbiting an object at configurable distance, elevation, and rotation.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Smoothly follow an object at a distance.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: ThirdPersonCamera

eventsFunctions.name: MoveCameraCloser
eventsFunctions.description: Move the camera closer to the object. This action must be called after the object has moved for the frame.

eventsFunctions.name: JumpToTargetedRotation
eventsFunctions.fullName: Rotate the camera all the way
eventsFunctions.description: Rotate the camera all the way to the targeted angle.

eventsFunctions.name: SetCameraRotation
eventsFunctions.description: Change the camera rotation.

eventsFunctions.name: RotationHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the halfway time for rotation of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetRotationHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the halfway time for rotation of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: ElevationHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the halfway  time for elevation rotation of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetElevationHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the halfway  time for elevation rotation of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: TranslationZHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the halfway time on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetTranslationZHalfwayDuration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the halfway time on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FollowFreeAreaZMax
eventsFunctions.fullName: Follow free area top border on Z axis
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the follow free area top border on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFollowFreeAreaZMax
eventsFunctions.fullName: Follow free area top border on Z axis
eventsFunctions.description: Change the follow free area top border on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: FollowFreeAreaZMin
eventsFunctions.fullName: Follow free area bottom border on Z axis
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the follow free area bottom border on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetFollowFreeAreaZMin
eventsFunctions.fullName: Follow free area bottom border on Z axis
eventsFunctions.description: Change the follow free area bottom border on Z axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: Distance
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the camera distance of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetDistance
eventsFunctions.description: Change the camera distance of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: OffsetX
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the lateral distance offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetOffsetX
eventsFunctions.description: Change the lateral distance offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: OffsetY
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the ahead distance offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetOffsetY
eventsFunctions.description: Change the ahead distance offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: OffsetZ
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the z offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetOffsetZ
eventsFunctions.description: Change the z offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: RotationAngleOffset
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the rotation angle offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetRotationAngleOffset
eventsFunctions.description: Change the rotation angle offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: ElevationAngleOffset
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the elevation angle offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetElevationAngleOffset
eventsFunctions.description: Change the elevation angle offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: TargetedRotationAngle
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the targeted camera rotation angle of the object. When this angle is set, the camera follow this value instead of the object angle.

eventsFunctions.name: SetTargetedRotationAngle
eventsFunctions.description: Change the targeted camera rotation angle of the object. When this angle is set, the camera follow this value instead of the object angle.

eventsFunctions.name: LookFromDistanceAtPosition3D
eventsFunctions.fullName: Look at a position from a distance
eventsFunctions.description: Move the camera to look at a position from a distance.

eventsFunctions.name: LookFromDistanceAtObject3D
eventsFunctions.fullName: Look at an object from a distance
eventsFunctions.description: Move the camera to look at an object from a distance.

description:
Move the camera  to look at an object from a given distance with a rotation and an elevation angles.

It can be useful for:
- 3D platformer games ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-platformer))
- 3D racing games ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-car-coin-hunt))
- Orbit camera controls ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-tile-based-city-builder))
- Isometric-like point of view ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://3d-road-crosser))
